title: Mandatory Conciliation. In compliance with the existing rules and
content: 48 issuances on Single Entry Approach (SEnA) pursuant to R.A. No. 10396, complaints 49 involving seafarers, LMAs, or principals/employers relating to overseas employment shall 50 undergo mandatory conciliation before docketing, unless otherwise provided by 51 subsequent issuances of the Department. 52 53
